title: LRU Cache
input_format: A sequence of operations: `LRUCache` (initialization with capacity), `put` (key, value), and `get` (key).
output_format: The array of results corresponding to each operation (where `put` returns `null` and `get` returns an integer).
constraints:
- `1 <= capacity <= 3000`
- `0 <= key <= 10^4`
- `0 <= value <= 10^5`
- At most `2 * 10^5` calls will be made to `get` and `put`.
